hooks.command: powershell.exe -NoLogo -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$p=Join-Path $env:DEVIN_PROJECT_DIR 'tools/governance.py'; if(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue){& py -3 -X utf8 $p hook-stop --repo $env:DEVIN_PROJECT_DIR}else{& python -X utf8 $p hook-stop --repo $env:DEVIN_PROJECT_DIR}"
